projectDescription: An automated perpetual futures trading bot for AsterDEX, featuring dual strategies (Watermellon and Peach Hybrid), advanced risk controls, and production-grade logging.
keyFeatures: Dual strategy engine: Watermellon (EMA+RSI trend) and Peach Hybrid (V1 trend bias + V2 momentum surge)
Configurable risk management: position sizing, leverage limits, stop-loss, take-profit, trailing stops
Dry-run and live execution modes with full audit logging
Virtual bar builder aggregating WebSocket ticks into synthetic OHLCV bars
Persistent state across restarts via bot-state.json
ADX regime filter to block entries in non-trending conditions
Daily CSV/JSON trade logs and signal logs for research and compliance
publicApiSurface: VirtualBarBuilder — aggregates ticks into synthetic bars
BotRunner — main orchestrator (EventEmitter: signal, position, log, stop)
RestPoller — periodic REST polling against fapi.asterdex.com
npm run bot — start the trading bot (tsx src/bot/index.ts)
